headline: AXP Q1 Deep Dive: Premium Portfolio Momentum and Strategic Investments Meet Cautious Market Response
summary: Global payments company American Express (NYSE:AXP) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 19.5% year on year to $18.91 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.28 per share was 7.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: GDV’s $1.80 annual payout faces a hidden test as leverage amplifies market risk
summary: The Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) has pushed to an all-time high of roughly $29, with shares changing hands at about $29 and annual distributions stepped up to $1.80 per share. This article examines whether the monthly payout is backed by durable cash flow from the underlying portfolio, or whether the rally has pulled ... GDV’s $1.80 annual payout faces a hidden test as leverage amplifies market risk

headline: American Express Gets Dueling Calls From BofA and Barclays: Which Side Is Right?
summary: American Express‘s (NYSE:AXP) Q1 2026 earnings beat drew a split verdict from Wall Street. Bank of America reiterated its Buy rating and raised its price target to $387 from $381, while Barclays kept an Equal Weight rating and trimmed its price target to $322 from $323. The disagreement cuts to the heart of the premium ... American Express Gets Dueling Calls From BofA and Barclays: Which Side Is Right?
